title: DAYTIME WINTER WARMING CENTER - 211info
text: LEBANON SENIOR CENTER DAYTIME WINTER WARMING CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a drop-in day space to go inside out of the cold to warm up temporarily throughout the winter season. 80 Tangent Street Lebanon, OR 97355 Eligibility: Ages 50 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm. Closed holidays. (541) 258-4919 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 258-4919 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call ahead to confirm hours FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Linn County Services: Extreme Cold Warming Centers If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LEBANON SENIOR CENTER
